name: xero
title: Xero Accounting
description: Read-only access to Xero: contacts, sales invoices (AR), purchase bills (AP), chart of accounts, and P&L reports. Each user authenticates against their own Xero account and explicitly picks which connected organisation queries should run against.

credentials.label: Client ID
credentials.description: Shown as 'Client id' on your registered app at developer.xero.com/myapps. (OAuth2 calls this the client_id.)

credentials.label: Client Secret
credentials.description: Shown as 'Client secret' on the same app page — generate at developer.xero.com/myapps → your app → Configuration → Generate a secret. Copy the VALUE, not the ID.

credentials.label: Admin Refresh Token
credentials.description: Not surfaced in the wizard. Each Telegram user runs their own sign-in dance the first time they ask the bot anything Xero-related — no platform-level token needed. Admins who want a platform token for direct/CLI use can set it via `sudo agenthq-cred set xero_refresh_token`.

xero_complete_auth.description: Finish the per-user OAuth dance — pass the redirect URL the user copied back from their browser

xero_who_am_i.description: Diagnostic: report whether the calling user has linked their Xero account and which organisation is currently active

xero_organisations.description: List the Xero organisations the linked user is connected to — used to populate xero_set_active_org

xero_set_active_org.description: Pick which connected organisation subsequent queries should run against — pass the tenant_id from xero_organisations. Required before any data tool will work, even if there's only one org.

xero_organisation_info.description: Sanity check + metadata for the currently active organisation (legal name, base currency, country, financial year end)

xero_contacts.description: Search contacts (customers + suppliers) by name fragment — returns ContactID for drill-down

xero_invoices.description: List sales invoices (Type=ACCREC) — accounts receivable, what's owed TO the org. Optional date range and status filter.

xero_bills.description: List purchase bills (Type=ACCPAY) — accounts payable, what the org owes. Optional date range and status filter.

xero_accounts.description: List the chart of accounts — class filter (REVENUE, EXPENSE, ASSET, LIABILITY, EQUITY) and code prefix supported

xero_pl.description: Profit & Loss summary report between two dates

xero_raw_get.description: Escape hatch: GET an arbitrary Xero accounting endpoint with optional query params
